mh.config.title: Murder Mystery Helper
mh.config.general.mode.desc:
Select the game mode

Classic: Detect murderers with swords and detectives with bows
Assassination: Everyone has weapons, weapon detection disabled,Determine the killer based on who killed someone (experimental)
mh.config.highlight.murderer.desc: Highlight the murderer with a glow effect
mh.config.highlight.detective.desc: Highlight the detective with a glow effect
mh.config.highlight.droppedBow.desc: Show a glow effect around dropped bows
mh.config.colors.murdererRed.desc: Red color ratio of the murderer glow (0-255)
mh.config.colors.murdererGreen.desc: Green color ratio of the murderer glow (0-255)
mh.config.colors.murdererBlue.desc: Blue color ratio of the murderer glow (0-255)
mh.config.colors.detectiveRed.desc: Red color ratio of the detective glow (0-255)
mh.config.colors.detectiveGreen.desc: Green color ratio of the detective glow (0-255)
mh.config.colors.detectiveBlue.desc: Blue color ratio of the detective glow (0-255)
mh.config.notify.soundMurderer.desc: Play a sound when a murderer is detected
mh.config.notify.soundDetective.desc: Play a sound when a detective is detected
mh.config.notify.chatMurderer.desc: Send a chat message when a murderer is detected
mh.config.notify.chatDetective.desc: Send a chat message when a detective is detected
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.murdermys: A helper to play MurderMystery - detects murderers with swords and detectives with bows
